generated_oml:

    base:desc "Sensors providing temperature data through automated data acquisition pipelines for real-time synchronization with the digital twin."

]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors providing occupancy data through automated data acquisition pipelines for real-time synchronization with the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancySensorDataTransmitted
]

instance EnvironmentalSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors providing environmental data through automated data acquisition pipelines for real-time synchronization with the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance OccupancySensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EnvironmentalSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancySensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance EnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time environmental measurements from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

    base:desc "HVAC system actuators for physical adjustments via digital commands"
]

]

    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoring, PredictiveAnalytics
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management"

]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualization
]

instance BIMAuthoringTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM authoring tools for model creation and management"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMValidation, ExtractMetadata
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering frameworks for automated artifact generation from semantic BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMValidation, ExtractMetadata, ModelTransformation, RuntimeConfigurationManagement
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM models enriched with Building Control System (BCS) device semantics and middleware metadata for spatial, geometric, and operational information"

]

]

instance BuildingInfrastructure : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Unified virtual representation for real-time monitoring, simulation, and life cycle-encompassing optimization of physical building operations in AECO domain"
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, OccupancySensor, EnvironmentalSensor, HVACActuator, LightingControlActuator, ModularArchitecture
]

instance ModularArchitecture : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Modular service-oriented architecture with standardized extension points for scalable integration of services"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the digital twin to adjust physical systems (e.g., lighting, HVAC) through bidirectional communication protocols using Eclipse Hono and Ditto, enabling closed-loop control of Building Control Systems (BCS)."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with continuous data exchange for immediate updates between physical and virtual systems, ensuring immediate response to operational changes."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "An integrated system comprising BIM-based models, Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange, Unreal Engine 5 for visualization, and modular services with standardized extension points for scalable and interoperable digital twin deployment in AECO contexts."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers all building life cycle stages from initial design through construction, operation, and refurbishment, enabling life cycle-encompassing optimization of building operations."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Evaluated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to ensure interoperability and architectural soundness, with mechanisms to address semantic drift through synchronization techniques between digital and physical counterparts."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto for bidirectional real-time data exchange between physical assets and the digital twin, leveraging IoT protocols for secure and scalable communication."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to Building Information Modeling (BIM) standards, Eclipse Hono and Ditto specifications, and standardized extension points for interoperable service integration across heterogeneous systems."
]
